evals.prompt: Update frontmatter status to 'done' on these 3 project files: 20_Project/Alpha.md, 20_Project/Beta.md, 20_Project/Gamma.md
evals.expected_output: The dispatcher skips restatement and confirmation, assesses the task, and dispatches sub-agents to update the files directly.
expectations: Dispatcher does NOT restate the task or ask for confirmation before acting
Dispatcher does NOT create a formal task decomposition tree
Dispatcher spawns sub-agents via the Agent tool for file edits
Dispatcher delivers a consolidated summary after agents complete
All 3 target files have status: done in frontmatter after completion

evals.prompt: with review — Add a 'tags: [physics]' frontmatter field to all notes in 30_Research/Physics/
evals.expected_output: The dispatcher dispatches implementation agents, reports results, then dispatches one consolidated reviewer agent to audit all changes.
expectations: Dispatcher detects the 'with review' flag from the invocation
Dispatcher dispatches implementation sub-agents via Agent tool
Dispatcher delivers a consolidated summary after implementation agents complete
Dispatcher dispatches exactly one reviewer agent after implementation
Dispatcher reports reviewer findings to the user
All target files have tags: [physics] in frontmatter after completion
